competitors.name: ts-run-types (schema)
competitors.source:
() =>
    createValidate(
      RT.object({
        id: RT.number(),
        title: RT.string(),
        slug: RT.string(),
        body: RT.string(),
        tags: RT.array(RT.string()),
        author: RT.object({name: RT.string(), email: RT.string()}),
        published: RT.boolean(),
        publishedAt: RT.optional(RT.string()),
        meta: RT.object({views: RT.number(), likes: RT.number()}),
      })
    )

competitors.name: typia
typebox
competitors.source:
c(
    Type.Object({
      id: Type.Number(),
      title: Type.String(),
      slug: Type.String(),
      body: Type.String(),
      tags: Type.Array(Type.String()),
      author: Type.Object({name: Type.String(), email: Type.String()}),
      published: Type.Boolean(),
      publishedAt: Type.Optional(Type.String()),
      meta: Type.Object({views: Type.Number(), likes: Type.Number()}),
    })
  )

competitors.name: zod
competitors.source:
c(z.object({
      id: z.number(),
      title: z.string(),
      slug: z.string(),
      body: z.string(),
      tags: z.array(z.string()),
      author: z.object({name: z.string(), email: z.string()}),
      published: z.boolean(),
      publishedAt: z.string().optional(),
      meta: z.object({views: z.number(), likes: z.number()}),
    }))
